name: Eldritch Omniscience
entries: You have better mastered the magical arts. The number of spells you can learn and can have prepared increases by 4. Additionally, whenever you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} you gain 1 additional spell slot of whichever level you choose.
If a creature dies as a result of one of your spells, you can instantly draw that soul into your soul vessel without using a {@action Magic|XPHB} action or {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}.
